---
title: "Events"
date: 2025/01/29
date-format: long
date-modified: last-modified
sidebar: false
format:
  html:
    embed-resources: true
listing:
  - id: "future"
    max-description-length: 1000
    fields: [event-date, title, description]
    contents:
      - "2026/basel_workshop_2026.qmd"
      - "2026/bulgaria_trainingschool_2026.qmd"
      - "2026/zaragoza_paleofire_2026.qmd"
    sort: "event-date asc"
    type: grid
    grid-columns: 3
    grid-item-align: left
    grid-item-border: true
    categories: false
    filter-ui: false
    
  - id: "past"
    max-description-length: 1000
    fields: [event-date, title, description]
    contents:
      - "2025/macedonia_wg2_2025.qmd"
      - "2025/prague_2025.qmd"
    sort: "event-date desc"
    type: grid
    grid-columns: 3
    grid-item-align: left
    grid-item-border: true
    categories: false
    filter-ui: false
---

# Upcoming Events

These are our scheduled future events. Join us to collaborate, learn, and contribute to open paleoecological data!

::: {#future}
:::

# Past Events

Explore our previous workshops, training schools, and meetings.

::: {#past}
:::
